cards.title: Therapeutic Diets
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Anti-inflammatory diet: Mediterranean + omega-3
  • Low-FODMAP: Phase 1 (6 wks), Phase 2 (reintroduction)
  • Ketogenic: Clinical applications (epilepsy, weight, T2DM)
  • Renal diet: Low potassium, phosphorus, sodium
  • DASH diet: Hypertension, evidence level A
